Bash(cd "/c/Users/cglynn/myPython/emea_gov" && python3 -c "
import pandas as pd

inc = pd.read_csv\('SNOW_Exports/Current/EMEA_GOV_Incidents.csv'\)
inc['sys_class_name'] = 'incident'
inc = inc.rename\(columns={'incident_state': 'state'}\)

prob = pd.read_csv\('SNOW_Exports/Current/EMEA_GOV_Problems.csv'\)
prob['sys_class_name'] = 'problem'
prob = prob.rename\(columns={'problem_state': 'state'}\)

consolidated = pd.concat\([inc, prob], ignore_index=True\)
consolidated.to_csv\('SNOW_Exports/Current/EMEA_GOV_Weekly_Consolidated.csv', index=False\)
print\(f'Written: {len\(consolidated\)} rows \({len\(inc\)} incidents + {len\(prob\)} problems\)'\)
print\(f'Columns: {list\(consolidated.columns\)}'\)
")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/cglynn/myPython/emea_gov" && python -c "
import pandas as pd

inc = pd.read_csv\('SNOW_Exports/Current/EMEA_GOV_Incidents.csv', encoding='latin-1'\)
inc['sys_class_name'] = 'incident'
inc = inc.rename\(columns={'incident_state': 'state'}\)

prob = pd.read_csv\('SNOW_Exports/Current/EMEA_GOV_Problems.csv', encoding='latin-1'\)
prob['sys_class_name'] = 'problem'
prob = prob.rename\(columns={'problem_state': 'state'}\)

consolidated = pd.concat\([inc, prob], ignore_index=True\)
consolidated.to_csv\('SNOW_Exports/Current/EMEA_GOV_Weekly_Consolidated.csv', index=False, encoding='utf-8'\)
print\(f'Written: {len\(consolidated\)} rows \({len\(inc\)} incidents + {len\(prob\)} problems\)'\)
print\(f'Columns: {list\(consolidated.columns\)}'\)
")
